weather.forecast: Issued 04:00 AM PDT 13 April 2026 Today Tonight and Tuesday. Strong wind warning in effect. Wind northwest 10 to 15 knots except southwest 15 south of Tsawwassen. Wind becoming northwest 20 to 25 Tuesday evening. Showers Tuesday.

weather.synopsis: Issued 4:00 AM PDT 13 April 2026 Today Tonight and Tuesday At 9:30 p.m. PDT tonight cold front located on a line northeast-southwest over Queen Charlotte Sound. By midnight PDT tonight cold front located on a line northeast-southwest over the Central Coast. At 10:30 a.m. PDT Tuesday cold front located on a line northeast-southwest over northwestern Vancouver Island. By 4:00 p.m. PDT Tuesday cold front located on a line northeast-southwest over the northern Strait of Georgia.
